tools.description: Use this for cross-object semantic analysis: impact, dependencies, complexity, naming, summary. See tool-help for mode selection. Requires the KB index to be Ready for impact/callers modes — check genexus_lifecycle action=status if results look empty.

format.description: mode=dependency_heatmap: ascii adds rendered bar chart.

waitForIndex.description: mode=impact: block up to 30s for Ready index (default true).

tools.name: genexus_analyze

tools.description: Introspect REST endpoints exposed by HTTP procedures. action=list|describe|snapshot|diff_baseline. Returns endpoints + detects breaking changes vs a saved baseline.

baseline.description: Baseline name under .gx/api-baselines/ or absolute path (action=diff_baseline).

tools.name: genexus_api

tools.description: Apply a pattern (e.g. WorkWithPlus) to a parent (IDE Right-click → Apply Pattern). Transaction=family-gen; WebPanel/SDPanel=direct-attach (pass settings.template). mode=diagnose (or dryRun=true) returns findings without mutating. Working on Smart Devices? → resources/read uri=genexus://kb/skills/sd-panel-mobile for Main object semantics.

dryRun.description: Alias for mode=diagnose. When true, returns pattern findings without mutating.

mode.description: apply (default) mutates; diagnose returns reasons without applying.

validate.description: After apply, build the generated host. Adds validation block (60-180s). Catches binding errors.

tools.name: genexus_apply_pattern

tools.description: Headless-browser verification umbrella. action=smoke (HTTP 200 + clean console), a11y (axe), wcag (caption/tooltip lint), capture (console/network/exceptions), cross (multi-engine), preview (render WebPanel + capture HTML/a11y/screenshot, optionally diff baseline). preview uses mode=render|run (default render; run auto-resolves the KB launcher, IDE F5 parity).
tools.name: genexus_browser

tools.description: Creation umbrella. action: object (Transaction/Procedure/WebPanel/SDT/Domain/Dashboard; Domain takes dataType+length or enumValues; NOT WWP — use genexus_apply_pattern) | popup (popup WebPanel with Form type='layout' body) | sd_panel_create|sd_panel_inspect|sd_panel_edit | save_as (clone parts) | scaffold|translate|sample (forge) | template (kpi_header|empty_state|confirm_dialog).
tools.name: genexus_create

tools.description: Database umbrella. action: drift_check|drift_report (Transaction↔DB schema drift) | optimize_analyze|optimize_suggest|optimize_report (static index advisor) | sql_ddl|sql_navigation (SQL for Transaction/Procedure) | sample_data (fake INSERTs) | types_list|types_describe|types_validate (Domains/SDT constraints) | translations_import.
tools.name: genexus_db

tools.description: Delete an object from the KB. Irreversible — confirm=true required. dryRun=true returns what would be deleted without persisting.

dryRun.description: When true, returns the object that would be deleted without deleting it.

tools.name: genexus_delete_object

tools.description: Use to generate structured docs (wiki, sequence diagrams, health reports). Don't use for programmatic analysis (see genexus_analyze) or source (see genexus_read).
tools.name: genexus_doc

tools.description: Health check: GX install, KB state, worker, cache age, recent telemetry. Paste output for triage when something feels off. When more than one KB is open, pass kb=<alias> to pick which one to diagnose.

kb.description: Alias of the KB to diagnose. Optional; required only when multiple KBs are open (otherwise the single open / default KB is used).

tools.name: genexus_doctor

tools.description: Edit object part. name or targets (exclusive). mode: full|patch|ops. dryRun first. async=true returns an operationId for lifecycle polling. For WWP edit host's PatternInstance NOT the parent WebForm (gets overwritten on reapply). Uncertain about a property/method/event? → resources/read uri=genexus://kb/skills/navigation (or gam-integrated-security / sd-panel-mobile / webpanel-events) first.

async.description: Run as a background job. Result returns operationId/job_id for genexus_lifecycle polling.

baseVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency: pass the versionToken from the genexus_read this edit is based on. If the object changed since (e.g. edited in the IDE), the write is refused with StaleObject instead of overwriting the newer version. Omit to skip the check.

estimated_seconds.description: When async=true, expected runtime used for progress/job metadata (default 30).

ops.description: GeneXus semantic ops (NOT RFC 6902 JSON-Patch). Each item: {op, args}. Supported ops: set_attribute, add_attribute, remove_attribute (Transaction); add_rule, remove_rule (Transaction/Procedure/WebPanel); set_property (any kind). Use mode=patch for textual find/replace.

args.description: Op-specific args. set_attribute: {name, type?, description?}. add_attribute: {name, type, ...}. add_rule: {rule}. set_property: {name, value}.

replaceAll.description: patch mode only. Apply to ALL occurrences instead of requiring expectedCount to match exactly.

validate.description: strict (default) aborts on first error and post-write-verifies visual/PatternInstance writes (re-reads + diffs the persisted XML). best-effort applies what compiles and SKIPS the post-write XML re-read/diff (faster on large WebForm/PatternInstance writes; build to confirm). only runs in-memory, no persist.

visualVerify.description: Post-edit headless screenshot + pixel-diff vs baseline. See tool-help.

tools.name: genexus_edit

tools.description: Edit + rebuild callers in one call. Returns edit diff + impact + a build block that may include taskId/pollTarget for lifecycle follow-up.

content.description: New content. For mode=patch may be {find,replace} object.

patch.description: Same shape as genexus_edit.patch. Auto-sets mode=patch.

visualVerify.description: Post-edit headless screenshot + pixel-diff vs baseline. See tool-help.

tools.name: genexus_edit_and_build

tools.description: Semantic WebForm edits. Actions: add_textblock, add_button, set_visibility, remove_control, wrap_in_fieldset.
tools.name: genexus_edit_form

tools.description: Format a GeneXus code snippet using worker rules.

examples.code:
for each Customer where CustomerId = &Id
  &Name = CustomerName
endfor

tools.name: genexus_format

tools.description: Surface GxServer sync state (status/pending/conflicts/history). Read-only v1. Returns {connected:false} when KB is not linked.
tools.name: genexus_gxserver

tools.description: Use to snapshot an object: metadata, variables, structure, signature. Raw shape, no source text — use genexus_read for code. runtimeIds requires a prior build.
tools.name: genexus_inspect

tools.description: IO umbrella for assets, part text exchange, screenshots, OCR. action: asset_find|asset_read|asset_write (binary asset CRUD) | export_part|import_part (object part to/from a text file) | export_unified (full object envelope JSON) | screenshot_publish (copy PNG to .gx/published-screenshots) | ocr (Tesseract stub).
tools.name: genexus_io

tools.description: Manage open KBs and startup config. list/open/close/set_default operate on WorkerPool; set_startup/get_startup mirror IDE 'Set As Startup Object'.

alias.description: KB alias. open: auto from path basename if omitted.

path.description: Absolute KB path (required for open if alias not in config).

tools.name: genexus_kb

tools.description: SDK layout/WebForm ops: get_tree, set_property, find_controls, inspect_surface, scan_mutators. For object-level properties use genexus_properties; for object-level visual structure use genexus_structure get_visual.
tools.name: genexus_layout

tools.description: Build, validate, index, or poll the KB. Long ops are async with operationId. dryRun=true (build/rebuild/index) returns the build plan or index plan without executing. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_lifecycle for actions and target formats.

dryRun.description: build/rebuild/index: returns the plan (object list / index entries) without executing.

includeCallees.description: Build: expand call graph so callees compile first (default transitive).

target.description: Object name(s), taskId, job_id, or op:<id>. Build accepts CSV ('Foo,Bar').

wait_until_done.description: Build/rebuild: block in one turn until terminal (up to wait_seconds, default 600).

tools.name: genexus_lifecycle

tools.description: List objects with pagination. Feed nextOffset until hasMore=false. Returns minimal shape by default (name, type, path, parent); verbose=true for full shape.

cursor.description: Opaque token from prior nextCursor. Use with sort=lastUpdate for stable paging.

filter.description: Legacy: name OR description. Prefer nameFilter/descriptionFilter.

modifiedBefore.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate < modifiedBefore.

projection.description: minimal=name+type+lastUpdate; standard=default compact; verbose=all fields. Overrides axiCompact when set.

since.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate >= since.

tools.name: genexus_list_objects

tools.description: View navigation report (IDE Right-click → View Navigation). latest=true returns cached report from .gx/navigation-cache; else runs fresh.

latest.description: Return the most recent cached navigation if any; otherwise run fresh.

tools.name: genexus_navigation

tools.description: Read or update GeneXus object properties. Note: Description is the title-bar text shown when a WebPanel/Popup is opened via .Popup(). Uncertain a property exists or what values it takes? → resources/read uri=genexus://kb/skills/navigation (CallProtocol does NOT apply to Web/SD Panels and 'Modal' is not a value). Use genexus_layout set_property for layout control properties.

control.description: Optional. Layout control name (e.g. BtnConfirmar), variable name with & prefix (e.g. &Alu2RegProf), or attribute name.

tools.name: genexus_properties

tools.description: Search objects in active KB. Prefixes: name:, type:, usedby:, parent:, parentPath:, description:. name:"X" (or bare quoted "X") demands exact-name match — use it when you know the object's name. Compact by default. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_query. Requires the KB index to be Ready — check genexus_lifecycle action=status if results look empty.

cursor.description: Opaque token from prior nextCursor. Use with sort=lastUpdate for stable paging.

modifiedBefore.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate < modifiedBefore.

since.description: ISO-8601 UTC. Only items with lastUpdate >= since.

sort.description: relevance (default) or lastUpdate (newest first; bypasses score ranking).

tools.name: genexus_query

tools.description: Read parts of objects. name or targets + parts=[...]. Paginate via offset/limit. Response carries versionToken — pass it as baseVersion on genexus_edit for a safe (optimistic-concurrency) write. See genexus://kb/tool-help/genexus_read.

parts.description: When set, only the listed parts are returned in a combined response. Mutually exclusive with part/offset/limit.

tools.name: genexus_read

tools.description: Named playbooks + self-extending macros. action=list|describe|run|suggest_macro|crystallize.

action.description: suggest_macro: detect repeated sequences; crystallize: save one as a recipe.

tools.name: genexus_recipe

tools.description: Run GeneXus refactor: rename, extract procedure, or WWP condition set. For KB-wide rename with call-site patching (RenameObject/RenameAttribute), the response includes a patched-site count from RefactorService. dryRun=true previews what would change without persisting.

dryRun.description: When true, returns what would be changed without persisting.

target.description: Primary object or symbol to refactor.

tools.name: genexus_refactor

tools.description: Resolve runtime URL for an object (webRoot + aspx + encoded args). gamSession='auto'|{user,pass,...} captures GAM cookies. Does NOT open a browser. dryRun=true returns the resolved URL without performing GAM login.

dryRun.description: When true, returns the resolved URL without performing the GAM login step.

gamSession.description: 'auto' (use GXMCP_GAM_USER/PASS env) or {user, pass, repository?, loginUrl?}.

tools.name: genexus_run_object

tools.description: Dump SDK surface (types/methods/props) to docs/sdk-probe/. Use when hunting for entry points.
tools.name: genexus_sdk_probe

tools.description: Regex/semantic search across Procedure/DataProvider/WebPanel/Transaction source. Requires the KB index to be Ready — check genexus_lifecycle action=status if results look empty.

argMatches.description: Positional arg index to expected literal text.

fields.description: Whole-field metadata match (returns matchedValue, no line context). Default [source]. Prefer scope=[webForm] for line-context WebForm hits; use fields=[webForm] only for a coarse contains-match.

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. Inline reads of top N distinct objects in response.

scope.description: Parts to scan with line-numbered context. Default [source]. webForm/layout scans the WebPanel/Transaction visual XML (control names, captions, classes, bindings).

tools.name: genexus_search_source

tools.description: Audit KB security. action=audit_gam scans GAM/env props; action=scan_secrets greps Source for credential-shaped literals. Returns findings with severity.
tools.name: genexus_security

tools.description: Read or update visual and logical structure of GeneXus objects. For layout control trees use genexus_layout get_tree; for object-level visual structure use get_visual here.
tools.name: genexus_structure

tools.description: Observability umbrella. action: executions (recent invocations) | watch_event (ops mentioning an event) | friction_append|friction_tail (.gx/friction.jsonl) | learning_report (aggregate friction) | logs (worker_debug.log tail) | profile_analyze|profile_hotspots|profile_correlate (GeneXus profiler XML).

event.description: watch_event: event name to match in operation payload.

grep.description: logs: substring filter on log lines.

message.description: friction_append: description of the friction encountered.

n.description: friction_tail: number of recent lines to return.

path.description: profile_*: path to the GeneXus profiler XML file.

tail.description: logs: number of tail lines from worker_debug.log.

tool.description: friction_append: tool name that produced the friction entry.

top.description: profile_hotspots: top-N hottest procedures to return.

tools.name: genexus_telemetry

tools.description: Execute native GeneXus tests (GXtest).
tools.name: genexus_test

tools.description: Variables part CRUD. action: add | delete (idempotent; refuses GAM/WWP+ framework-managed vars) | modify (atomically change type; preserves name+description). async=true returns an operationId for lifecycle polling. dryRun=true previews the change without persisting. varName required for all; typeName required for add+modify.

async.description: Run as a background job. Result returns operationId/job_id for genexus_lifecycle polling.

dryRun.description: When true, returns what would change without persisting.

estimated_seconds.description: When async=true, expected runtime used for progress/job metadata (default 30).

tools.name: genexus_variable

tools.description: Versioning umbrella. action: history_list|history_get|history_save|history_restore (snapshot store; restore+discard=true is IDE 'Discard changes' parity) | undo (revert last N edits) | time_travel (recover bytes from a past git commit) | blame (git blame an object part) | diff (text: mode=textVsText|currentVsText) | diff_generated (against=last-build|git-head).

filePath.description: blame: absolute or KB-relative file path.

left.description: diff: left-side text or snapshot label.

right.description: diff: right-side text or snapshot label.

tools.name: genexus_versioning

tools.description: KB context + version + health (worker/index/database) + next-step hints. Call FIRST every session. Lean by default; pass verbose=true ONCE for the inline playbooks + skills catalog of verified GeneXus reference resources (navigation, GAM, SD panel, WebPanel events). For a minimal connection+index health check use genexus_doctor.

verbose.description: Include the static playbooks + skills catalog + per-tool stats/heatmap. Default false (lean health payload).

tools.name: genexus_whoami

tools.description: Reload worker. modes: soft (drain+respawn), hard (copy sourceDir+respawn). force=true: gateway kills directly. See tool-help.

force.description: Bypass drain; gateway kills + respawns. Use when worker is wedged.

tools.name: genexus_worker_reload
